S.FORM: Willie Aames kawas tay 1960, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 7, Willie Aames, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: willie aames~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, willie aames~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
